headline: CSX (CSX) Surpasses Q1 Earnings Estimates
summary: CSX (CSX) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +10.88% and -0.80%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
